hake-with-vegetables-in-the-oven-telecul.name: Hake With Vegetables In The Oven
instructions: On a tray, have hake and season with lemon juice, chopped garlic teeth, salt and pepper. Involve and let marinate for 30 minutes.

After the time indicated, add the chopped onions, potatoes, previously peeled and cut into cubes, peas, tomato pulp and water. Water with olive oil, tape with aluminium foil and oven, preheated at 180°C, for 35 minutes.
Then eliminate the foil, stir and let cook for another 10 minutes, watering with the sauce itself. Remove from the oven and serve decorated with cilantros.

halibut-on-mashed-fava-beans-with-mint.name: Halibut On Mashed Fava Beans With Mint

ingredients.prep: shelled, or 2 1/2 cups frozen double-peeled fava beans

instructions: Cook fava beans in large saucepan of boiling salted water 2 minutes; drain. Transfer to large bowl of ice water. Cool beans; peel if using fresh beans. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Mix 2 teaspoons mint, 1 teaspoon lemon peel, 3/4 teaspoon coarse salt, and 1 pinch of red pepper in small bowl. Arrange fish on large rimmed baking sheet. Rub mint mixture all over fish. DO AHEAD Can be made 4 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

Heat 2 tablespoons oil in heavy large skillet over medium heat. Add fava beans. Sprinkle with coarse salt, black pepper, and pinch of red pepper. Cook until heated through and tender, stirring occasionally and adding water by 1/4 cupfuls if dry, about 5 minutes. Using potato masher, mash beans to coarse puree, adding water by 1/4 cupfuls if dry. Season with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 4 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Dredge fish in flour, shaking off excess. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in each of 2 heavy large skillets over medium-high heat. Cook fish until lightly browned and just opaque in center, about 4 minutes per side.
Meanwhile, rewarm fava bean puree. Stir in remaining 1/4 cup mint, 1 teaspoon lemon peel, and 3 tablespoons olive oil.
Divide fava bean puree among plates. Top with fish and serve.

halloumi-and-zucchini-frittata.name: Halloumi And Zucchini Frittata

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a small, ovenproof skillet over medium heat. Add zucchini and a pinch of salt and cook until soft, about 5 minutes. Add chopped mint and dill, and cook 1 minute more.

Beat eggs with salt and pepper in a small bowl. Pour into the hot skillet with the zucchini and briefly stir. Cook without stirring to allow the bottom of the frittata to set, about 2 minutes. Use a spatula around the edges of the skillet to ensure that the frittata isn't sticking as the bottom starts to set.
Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.

Lay the slices of halloumi on the top of the frittata as the edges start to set. Place the skillet under the broiler until the top of the frittata is fully set and cheese is slightly browned, about 5 minutes. Serve immediately or at room temperature.

hand-rolled-walnut-baklava-recipe-lezzet.name: Hand Rolled Walnut Baklava Recipe
instructions: 1. Cheerbet to the pot to pick up sugar and water.
2. Boil about 10 minutes in medium fire when you start boiling.
3. Then add the lemon juice and boil for 2 minutes, then take it from the stove and leave the chicken to cool completely.
4. Take eggs, milk, liquid oil and vinegar to the kneading container.
5. Add the baking powder and knead a soft consistency, non-stick dough by adding the flour to the azar.
6. After 10 minutes rest, take 16–18 equal clotheye.
7. Close up and rest for 15 minutes.
8. Skip to main content.
9. Open your yufkaes topste strings are light and remember to sprinkle starch.
10. Bake tray fry grease the oven, index half of the Yufka to the tray and spread push.
11. 11. 11. 11. Place the same way above.
12. slice the bakeries in any way you want, and go to the uniform in any place.
12. August 180°about 35–45 minutes in the oven, look at the car up to nicely fry.
14 July From the oven hot baklava u let the taste of the colder pour and at the best 3–4 hours rest, and ensure that the joy is thoroughly çetc.
15.  Dinlendikten sonra dilimleyip servis edebilirsiniz.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

hanger-steak-with-tahini-and-smashed-cha.name: Hanger Steak With Tahini And Smashed Charred Beets

ingredients.prep: jalapeño, or cayenne), thinly sliced into rings

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Toss beets with 1 Tbsp. oil on a large, foil-lined rimmed baking sheet and season with salt. Roast, tossing once, until charred on the outside and tender, 45–50 minutes. Let cool slightly.
Meanwhile, whisk chile, vinegar, honey, and 2 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl. Season with salt.
Whisk tahini, lemon juice, 2 Tbsp. oil, and ¼ cup water in a small bowl until smooth and thick. Season with salt.

Season steaks with salt. Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook steaks, turning occasionally, until well-browned on all sides (about 4 minutes per side for medium-rare, or an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of steak registers 130°). Transfer steak to a cutting board and let rest 5 minutes before slicing.

Spoon tahini mixture onto plates, dividing evenly. Smash beets with the palm of your hand or the flat side of a chef’s knife and add to plates. Slice steak and place alongside beets. Drizzle chile dressing over, then top with scallions and red pepper flakes.

hard-candy.name: Hard Candy
instructions: Grease a cookie sheet with cooking spray.
Stir white sugar, corn syrup, and water together in a medium heavy-bottomed saucepan. Cook, stirring, over medium heat until sugar dissolves, then bring to a boil.
Without stirring, heat to 300 to 154°C (149 to 154 degrees C), or until a small amount of syrup dropped into cold water forms hard, brittle threads.
Remove from the heat and stir in flavored extract and food coloring. Pour onto the prepared cookie sheet. Dust top with confectioners' sugar.
Let cool until hardened, about 15 minutes. Break into about 36 pieces and store in an airtight container.

hazelnut-peanut-butter-marshmallow-squar.name: Hazelnut Peanut Butter Marshmallow Squares
instructions: Mix hazelnut spread, chips and margarine in a medium sized saucepan on low-medium heat till chips are melted and ingredients combine smoothly.
Remove from heat and add marshmallows until covered.
Pour mixture into a greased 8 x 8 pan and refrigerate for 2 hours.
Cut into squares when chilled and serve.

heart-shaped-pancakes-with-chocolate.name: Heart-shaped Pancakes With Chocolate
instructions: Whisk melted butter and egg yolk together in a small bowl.

Sift flour and baking powder into a large bowl; stir in sugar. Whisk in egg-butter mixture and 3/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons buttermilk until a smooth, thick batter forms. Add more buttermilk, 1 tablespoon at a time, if batter is too thick.

Melt 1 teaspoon butter in a nonstick skillet over high heat. Reduce the heat to medium and use a ladle to spoon 1/8 of the batter onto the hot skillet; fit as many pancakes on the skillet as possible without overcrowding. Cook until bubbles form and the edges are dry, 3 to 4 minutes. Flip and cook until browned on the other side, 2 to 3 minutes. Transfer to a warm plate. Repeat with remaining batter.
Use a large, heart-shaped cookie cutter to cut a heart in the center of each pancake. Discard scraps.
Place a few chocolate pieces on top of a warm pancake and sandwich another pancake on top. Repeat with remaining pancakes and chocolate.
Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar and serve.

herb-powder.name: Herb Powder
instructions: Preheat oven to 66°C or as low as it will go.
Spread out herbs on a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet and bake until dry and brittle, 1–1½ hours.
Working in batches, grind herbs in a spice mill to a fine powder.
Powder can be made 1 month ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

herbed-olive-oil.name: Herbed Olive Oil
instructions:
Pulse parsley, mint, and lemon zest in a food processor until coarsely chopped. Add oil and salt and pulse again until well combined.
Do Ahead: Herbed oil can be stored in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.

honey-brined-and-smoked-turkey.name: Honey-brined And Smoked Turkey
instructions: In a medium saucepan, heat 1 quart water, honey and salt over medium heat, stirring often, until salt is completely dissolved, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat. Pour mixture into a large brining container and add remaining 6 quarts cold water, vegetable stock, thyme, and peppercorns and stir to combine. Place the turkey in the brine, adding a weight (large heavy plate or saucepan) on top to keep it completely submerged, if needed. Refrigerate and brine for 12 to 18 hours.

Remove the turkey from the brine and pat dry with paper towels. Place turkey on a wire rack set in a rimmed baking sheet and refrigerate, uncovered, to let air dry for at least 8 hours or up to 24 hours. (This step is optional, but will result in a crisper skin.)

Remove the turkey from the refrigerator, fold the wings under the body and using butcher’s twine, tie the legs together. Brush the turkey all over with vegetable oil and let sit at room temperature while preparing the grill or smoker.

For a Charcoal Grill: Open bottom vent halfway. Light large chimney mounded with charcoal briquettes (about 7 quarts). Once the top coals are partially covered with ash, pour lit coals into a steeply banked pie against one side of the grill. Nestle 4 (3-inch) wood chunks into the coals. Set the cooking grate in place, cover, and open the lid vent halfway. Heat grill until hot and smoking, about 5 minutes. Clean and oil the cooking grate.

For a Smoker: Heat and maintain smoker temperature between 350 to 204°C (177 to 204℃) following manufacturer’s guidelines and tips. (see notes) Nestle 3 to 4 (3-inch) wood chunks into coals or heat source. Set cooking grate in place and clean and oil the cooking grate.

Once wood is smoking, place the turkey breast side up on the cooler side of the grill with legs closest to the coals if using a charcoal grill, or centered on the cooking grate if using a smoker. Cover and cook until breasts register 160℉ (71℃) and thighs register 175℉ (79℃), 2 to 3 hours. (see notes)
Transfer turkey to a carving board and let rest, uncovered, for 30 minutes. Carve turkey and serve.

how-to-make-a-delicious-baked-chicken-in.name: How To Make A Delicious Baked Chicken In Mustard And Lemon Sauce
how-to-make-a-delicious-baked-chicken-in.original_name: Cómo hacer un rico pollo al horno en salsa de mostaza y limón

how-to-make-baked-halibut-with-potatoes-.name: How To Make Baked Halibut With Potatoes
how-to-make-baked-halibut-with-potatoes-.original_name: Cómo hacer halibut al horno con papas

instructions: To start with, we'll peel the onion and mince them as small as possible.
We're also gonna peel his garlic teeth and mingle them into tiny pieces. If we can shredder them, so much better.
In the case of the pimenton, we will wash it and remove its head and open it to remove its seeds and remove its vein (the white part). Then we'll have to get him into his notebooks.

If for some reason we haven't minced the fresh parsley yet, this is a good time to do so. We'll have several parsley branches, we'll wash them well, we'll scrape them and we'll get them into tiny ruedites, and we'll complete half a cup of this ingredient.
Now let's get our potatoes. We'll peel them and pint them onto tires or cubes, as you prefer.

In the case of beef, we will start from the fact that it's clear and in pieces, ready to cook.
Then we'll warm up an oil chorrit, at medium heat, in a frying pan or pot. When it's hot, we'll soften onion and garlic, stirring often, till the onion starts to become clear.
After this point, we will add the pimenton, we will mix everything, and we will let it cook for another five minutes, stirring often.
While cooking the mixture, we will sprinkle a tablespoon of corn flour and mix with the rest of the ingredients.
Cuando se terminen los 5 minutos, vamos a agregar el vino, a mezclarlo y dejar que se cocine un par de minutos para que se evapore un poco.
Then we'll add the fried tomato and mix with everything. We will also add a pint of nutmeg, chopped parsley, pepper and salt to taste.

We will mix everything, and optionally we will pass through the blender so that the salsa takes a more liquid consistency (I highly recommend to do this). If you want the salsa to be less thick, you can add some water. Just be sure to mix up and try the salsa later, to correct the date with bad salt or pepper if necessary.

To continue with the recipe, we'll need a big frying pan. We'll heat up an oil chorrit and when it's hot, we'll put his pieces of potatoes and carrots. We'll paddle them quickly to seal them. It will be enough to cook them for a few minutes and turn them around so they can be sealed from both sides.

Then we will put the pieces to the edges of the frying pan and place at the centre the pieces of beef and seal them as well. If necessary, before we place the meat, we will add a little more oil to the frying pan.
We will seal the pieces of beef from both sides (about a minute of cooking from each side).

We will put the salsa onto the veal and vegetables, we will mix everything, we will introduce the laurel leaf into production, we will cover and we will let it be cooked for 40 minutes, with low heat.

When cooking time is complete, check the consistency of the flesh. If you wish me to be more tender, you can let them cook for a few more minutes. The salsa should also be tested to check the date. If necessary, fix with more salt and / or pepper, but be sure to re-mix everything well.
That's all. The calves are ready to serve.

how-to-make-tuna-tartare-comedera.name: How To Make Tuna Tartare
how-to-make-tuna-tartare-comedera.original_name: Cómo se hace el tartar de atún

ingredients.item: 1/4  de taza de salsa de soja
1 / 4 cup of seedling or sesame (black or white)
1 cucharadita cafetera de mostaza (es mejor si es mostaza a la antigua)
1 / 3 kilo of bluefin tuna (very fresh and clear)

instructions: Let's start by preparing a salsa or marinated with a tablespoon of oil (if it's sesame, the taste will be more strong), a little salt, mustard, some drops of lemon juice, and two or three tablespoons of soya.
Mezclaremos muy bien todos los ingredientes de la marinada. Luego, la reservaremos algunos minutos.
The following will be to mince the tuna (well clear) into small cubes or dice.
Then we will peel the half onion and we will also paint it into very, very small cubes.
In a bowl, we will mix onion and tuna, very delicately so as not to damage fish.
Now let's add the salsa to the bowl with onion and tuna and make sure that it's integrated well. To this end, we can remove some pieces again with care.
The ideal thing is to let tuna and onion sail a few minutes before they are consumed. Thus both ingredients will absorb the flavour of a marinade.
At the time of serving, tuna can be decorated with other sesame seeds and with a tablespoon of minced onions (optional).
To serve this plate in an oriental style, you can be accompanied by a little wasabi and a little ginger tipped, both by the tipstick.

how-to-prepare-vegetable-stew-comedera.name: How To Prepare Vegetable Stew

ingredients.item: 150 g ham (can be cooked or ham)
1  rama de puerro (solo utilizaremos la parte blanca)
Un chorro de vino blanco seco

instructions: We'll start with peeling and cutting them into cubes. We'll also peel the carrots and cut them onto wheels.
Then we prepared our artichokes for his cooking. Let's get his hard leaves and cut his tipples. In the case of the stem, some people prefer to remove it or can also skin to use the soft inner part.
When we have only soft and edible parts of artichokes, we will cut them into quarters. We will soak them with salt and lemon juice to prevent them from blackening.
We'll clear up the green beans. We'll scold them and cut his tipples and his sides. Finally, we'll cut them into pieces.
En el caso de la acelga, lavaremos muy bien las hojas y les quitaremos las hebras, si cuentan con ellas. Luego, las picaremos en trozos grandes.
We'll also peel the onion and cut it into small cubes. We will also cut the leek after washing them well and withdrawing the root.
Finally, we will remove the leaves from the cauliflower and divide them into branches and we will wash them up very well. Then we'll scold them.
In the case of ham, we will mince them into pits (or in pictures, if we have only frills).

Now with the ingredients ready to cook them, we'll heat up a good jet of oil in a big pot. That's where we're gonna soften the onion. We'll let them cook for five minutes and then we'll put in the leek and ham.
We'll stir and we'll soon add the tablespoon and a touch of salt and pepper to suit. We'll mix everything up again and cook 3 more minutes.
Then we'll have carrot and cauliflower. We'll also add the beans.
Enseguida regaremos con un chorro de vino blanco seco. Mezclaremos y daremos cinco minutos para que se evapore el alcohol, mientras las verduras se van cocinando.
Pasado este tiempo, incorpora las alcachofas y los guisantes, y cubre los ingredientes con agua, hasta sobrepasar por dos dedos el nivel de las verduras. Deja que todo se cocine durante 15 minutos.
After this time, we'll put in the acceleras and potatoes. If necessary, we will add more water to exceed the level of solid foods and let them cook for another 20 minutes.
Keep an eye on the cooking so that the mojo doesn't dry. If necessary, add some more water. The goal is that the ingredients will never be dried, so that we will eventually get a warm preparation.
After cooking time, try the motif and if necessary, fix the bowl with more salt and / or pepper.
It serves with an airy plate, with care to include all the ingredients in every ration as well as a little stock.

hummus.name: Hummus
instructions: {'step': '1', 'text': 'Drain 15.5 oz chickpeas in a strainer or colander and rinse thoroughly. Let drain again while you do the other prep.'}
{'step': '2', 'text': 'Cut 1 lemon in half, remove any visible seeds, and squeeze juice into a small bowl. You should have 3–4 Tbsp.'}
{'step': '3', 'text': 'Smash 1 garlic clove with the flat side of your knife on a cutting board and remove peel. Continue to mash with side of knife until a paste forms.'}
{'step': '4', 'text': 'Combine drained chickpeas, 3 Tbsp lemon juice, garlic, ½ cup tahini, ¾ tsp salt, 10 cracks pepper, ¼ tsp cumin, and 2 Tbsp water in a food processor.'}
{'step': '5', 'text': 'Process until smooth, about 1 minute.'}
{'step': '6', 'text': 'With the motor running, stream in 3 Tbsp oil, then continue to process until hummus is very light and creamy, about 1 minute longer.'}
{'step': '7', 'text': 'Taste and season with more salt if needed.'}
{'step': '8', 'text': 'Transfer hummus to a shallow bowl, top with za‚tar and/or sesame seeds, and drizzle with more oil.'}
